title: Blazing fast on-device GenAI with LiteRT-LM
summary: Blazing fast on-device GenAI with LiteRT-LM
whyItMatters: Google AI Edge’s LiteRT-LM provides a production-proven, highly optimized infrastructure for running Gemma 4 across cross-platform mobile and edge environments. It actively unlocks the model's native multimodal and agentic features on-device by utilizing memory-efficient dynamic loading, Multi-Token Prediction for up to a 2.2x speedup, and advanced orchestr…
